Object Detection, Object Tracking, Image and Video Processing, OpenCV, TensorRT
PyTorch, TensorFlow, Django, Flask, Streamlit, Angular
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Passionate Computer Vision and Machine Learning Engineer with experience in developing advanced AI solutions for real-time applications. Seeking opportunities to leverage my knowledge in deep learning, computer vision, and natural language processing within a collaborative environment to contribute to impactful projects and drive innovation.
EXPERIENCE
Built an interactive AI writing assistant on the Kissa platform to help children develop creative storytelling skills through guided narrative creation.
Developed robust web application using Django (backend) and Angular (frontend), incorporating real-time story creation tools and progress tracking.
Developed an automated fabric defect detection system using YOLOv8, achieving 92% accuracy in identifying multiple stain types in industrial textiles.
Created and annotated comprehensive dataset of fabric defects, implementing data augmentation techniques to improve model robustness.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
SKILLS
Programming Languages Machine Learning Deep Learning Computer Vision Frameworks and Tools DevOps and Deployment Databases Visualization
Docker, Edge Deployment, CI/CD with Jenkins
SQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, Tableau, Power BI
Optimized model performance through 8-bit quantization, reducing model size by 75% and inference time by 40% for edge device deployment.
Engineered an intelligent video processing system that automatically extracts and analyzes lengthy surveillance recordings from multiple hard drives.
Integrated ByteTracker algorithm for object tracking, enabling zone-based analytics with temporal metrics, achieving 95% tracking accuracy.
Data Scientist
Caustaza Group LTD
COMPUTER VISION & NATURAL LANGUAGE PROCESSING (NLP)
Computer Vision Engineer
Inveep
ACADEMIC PROJECTS
Project 1: Automated Fabric Defect Detection System
Jan 2024 - Present Tunis
Project 2: Intelligent Video Processing and Analysis System
Implemented end-to-end pipeline from data collection to model deployment, enabling real-time defect detection in production environment.
Implemented YOLOv8 object detection pipeline reducing 10+ hour videos to 1-hour highlight reels containing only relevant object interactions.
Developed automated notification system and file management pipeline, reducing manual video analysis time by 90% and storage requirements by 80%.
Project 3: Scalable AI Surveillance System
Engineered a scalable surveillance solution to monitor multiple environments by processing numerous simultaneous camera streams.
Deployed advanced object detection and tracking algorithms to intelligently identify, record, and issue alerts for critical events.
Developed a user-friendly web dashboard for real-time monitoring, system configuration, and secure access to live feeds and recordings.
Feb 2023 - Sept 2023 Tunis
Implemented automated storage management that systematically purges outdated footage .
Data Scientist
Estif´ eda
PROJECTS
EDUCATION
Created comprehensive training dataset by collecting and organizing 5000+ children's stories, creative writing examples, and educational dialogues.
Enhanced GPT-2 model performance through fine-tuning, resulting in improved child-friendly vocabulary and storytelling guidance.
Designed interactive storytelling features enabling children to develop characters, build plots, and structure narratives with AI guidance.
July 2022 - Sept 2022 Tunis
Engineering degree, Tek-up University 2020 - 2023
Preparatory cycle of engineering, FSS University 2017 - 2020
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Engineered an automated lead generation platform using Python and Selenium, processing 10,000+ LinkedIn profiles daily with 95% accuracy in relevant lead identification.
Implemented BERT-based NLP models for intelligent profile filtering and qualification, reducing manual screening time by 80% and improving lead quality by 60%.
Developed RESTful API using Django for backend operations and NextJS for responsive frontend, handling 1000+ concurrent users with 99.9% uptime.
Integrated automated email campaign system, achieving 25% higher response rates compared to manual outreach.
COVID-19 Mask Detection System (EfficientDet, YOLO-v4, OpenCV) Engineered a dual-model mask detection system combining EfficientDet and YOLO-v4, achieving 94% detection accuracy at 25 FPS. Implemented real-time analytics pipeline processing video feeds from multiple cameras, calculating masked vs. unmasked percentages with 98% uptime. Optimized model inference through TensorRT acceleration, reducing latency by 40% while maintaining accuracy. Deployed solution across 15+ business locations, enabling automated COVID-19 compliance monitoring and reducing manual oversight by 75%.
Fraud Detection in Energy Consumption (Random Forest, XGBoost, Streamlit) Engineered an end-toend fraud detection system processing 1M+ daily transactions with 92% accuracy using ensemble methods. Reduced false positives by 40% through feature engineering and custom anomaly detection algorithms. Deployed interactive dashboard using Streamlit, enabling real-time monitoring of suspicious activities across 100K+ customers.
E-commerce Recommendation System (LSTM, GRU) Designed and implemented a hybrid recommendation engine processing user behavior data from 1M+ transactions. Achieved 35% improvement in click-through rate using ensemble of LSTM and GRU models for sequence prediction. Reduced recommendation latency by 60% through model optimization and caching strategies. Increased average order value by 25% through personalized product recommendations.
markdown:
## ALAA ARBOUN

♦
+(216) 44241715
Ariana
♦
♦
arbounala@gmail.com
LinkedIn
GitHub
OBJECTIVE
Python (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-Learn), JavaScript
Classification, Regression, Clustering, Anomaly Detection, Recommendation Systems CNN, RNN, LSTM, GRU, GANs,Transformers,YOLO
Object Detection, Object Tracking, Image and Video Processing, OpenCV, TensorRT
PyTorch, TensorFlow, Django, Flask, Streamlit, Angular

## PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

### Passionate Computer Vision and Machine Learning Engineer with experience in developing advanced AI solutions for real-time applications. Seeking opportunities to leverage my knowledge in deep learning, computer vision, and natural language processing within a collaborative environment to contribute to impactful projects and drive innovation.
- EXPERIENCE
- Built an interactive AI writing assistant on the Kissa platform to help children develop creative storytelling skills through guided narrative creation.
- Developed robust web application using Django (backend) and Angular (frontend), incorporating real-time story creation tools and progress tracking.
### Developed an automated fabric defect detection system using YOLOv8, achieving 92% accuracy in identifying multiple stain types in industrial textiles.
### Created and annotated comprehensive dataset of fabric defects, implementing data augmentation techniques to improve model robustness.

## TECHNICAL SKILLS

SKILLS
Programming Languages Machine Learning Deep Learning Computer Vision Frameworks and Tools DevOps and Deployment Databases Visualization
Docker, Edge Deployment, CI/CD with Jenkins
SQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, Tableau, Power BI
Optimized model performance through 8-bit quantization, reducing model size by 75% and inference time by 40% for edge device deployment.
Engineered an intelligent video processing system that automatically extracts and analyzes lengthy surveillance recordings from multiple hard drives.
Integrated ByteTracker algorithm for object tracking, enabling zone-based analytics with temporal metrics, achieving 95% tracking accuracy.
Data Scientist
Caustaza Group LTD

## COMPUTER VISION & NATURAL LANGUAGE PROCESSING (NLP)

Computer Vision Engineer
Inveep

## ACADEMIC PROJECTS

### Project 1: Automated Fabric Defect Detection System
**Date:** Jan 2024 - Present Tunis
### Project 2: Intelligent Video Processing and Analysis System
- Implemented end-to-end pipeline from data collection to model deployment, enabling real-time defect detection in production environment.
- Implemented YOLOv8 object detection pipeline reducing 10+ hour videos to 1-hour highlight reels containing only relevant object interactions.
- Developed automated notification system and file management pipeline, reducing manual video analysis time by 90% and storage requirements by 80%.
### Project 3: Scalable AI Surveillance System
- Engineered a scalable surveillance solution to monitor multiple environments by processing numerous simultaneous camera streams.
### Deployed advanced object detection and tracking algorithms to intelligently identify, record, and issue alerts for critical events.
### Developed a user-friendly web dashboard for real-time monitoring, system configuration, and secure access to live feeds and recordings.
**Date:** Feb 2023 - Sept 2023 Tunis
- Implemented automated storage management that systematically purges outdated footage .
- Data Scientist
- Estif´ eda
- PROJECTS

## EDUCATION

### Created comprehensive training dataset by collecting and organizing 5000+ children's stories, creative writing examples, and educational dialogues.
### Enhanced GPT-2 model performance through fine-tuning, resulting in improved child-friendly vocabulary and storytelling guidance.
### Designed interactive storytelling features enabling children to develop characters, build plots, and structure narratives with AI guidance.
**Date:** July 2022 - Sept 2022 Tunis
### Engineering degree, Tek-up University 2020 - 2023
### Preparatory cycle of engineering, FSS University 2017 - 2020

## PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Engineered an automated lead generation platform using Python and Selenium, processing 10,000+ LinkedIn profiles daily with 95% accuracy in relevant lead identification.
Implemented BERT-based NLP models for intelligent profile filtering and qualification, reducing manual screening time by 80% and improving lead quality by 60%.
Developed RESTful API using Django for backend operations and NextJS for responsive frontend, handling 1000+ concurrent users with 99.9% uptime.
Integrated automated email campaign system, achieving 25% higher response rates compared to manual outreach.
COVID-19 Mask Detection System (EfficientDet, YOLO-v4, OpenCV) Engineered a dual-model mask detection system combining EfficientDet and YOLO-v4, achieving 94% detection accuracy at 25 FPS. Implemented real-time analytics pipeline processing video feeds from multiple cameras, calculating masked vs. unmasked percentages with 98% uptime. Optimized model inference through TensorRT acceleration, reducing latency by 40% while maintaining accuracy. Deployed solution across 15+ business locations, enabling automated COVID-19 compliance monitoring and reducing manual oversight by 75%.
Fraud Detection in Energy Consumption (Random Forest, XGBoost, Streamlit) Engineered an end-toend fraud detection system processing 1M+ daily transactions with 92% accuracy using ensemble methods. Reduced false positives by 40% through feature engineering and custom anomaly detection algorithms. Deployed interactive dashboard using Streamlit, enabling real-time monitoring of suspicious activities across 100K+ customers.
E-commerce Recommendation System (LSTM, GRU) Designed and implemented a hybrid recommendation engine processing user behavior data from 1M+ transactions. Achieved 35% improvement in click-through rate using ensemble of LSTM and GRU models for sequence prediction. Reduced recommendation latency by 60% through model optimization and caching strategies. Increased average order value by 25% through personalized product recommendations.

logical_sections.title: PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
content: Engineered an automated lead generation platform using Python and Selenium, processing 10,000+ LinkedIn profiles daily with 95% accuracy in relevant lead identification.
Implemented BERT-based NLP models for intelligent profile filtering and qualification, reducing manual screening time by 80% and improving lead quality by 60%.
Developed RESTful API using Django for backend operations and NextJS for responsive frontend, handling 1000+ concurrent users with 99.9% uptime.
Integrated automated email campaign system, achieving 25% higher response rates compared to manual outreach.

COVID-19 Mask Detection System (EfficientDet, YOLO-v4, OpenCV) Engineered a dual-model mask detection system combining EfficientDet and YOLO-v4, achieving 94% detection accuracy at 25 FPS. Implemented real-time analytics pipeline processing video feeds from multiple cameras, calculating masked vs. unmasked percentages with 98% uptime. Optimized model inference through TensorRT acceleration, reducing latency by 40% while maintaining accuracy. Deployed solution across 15+ business locations, enabling automated COVID-19 compliance monitoring and reducing manual oversight by 75%.

Fraud Detection in Energy Consumption (Random Forest, XGBoost, Streamlit) Engineered an end-toend fraud detection system processing 1M+ daily transactions with 92% accuracy using ensemble methods. Reduced false positives by 40% through feature engineering and custom anomaly detection algorithms. Deployed interactive dashboard using Streamlit, enabling real-time monitoring of suspicious activities across 100K+ customers.

E-commerce Recommendation System (LSTM, GRU) Designed and implemented a hybrid recommendation engine processing user behavior data from 1M+ transactions. Achieved 35% improvement in click-through rate using ensemble of LSTM and GRU models for sequence prediction. Reduced recommendation latency by 60% through model optimization and caching strategies. Increased average order value by 25% through personalized product recommendations.
